title: fix[docs]: Unindented example code on the index page

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** Approval requirements bypassed by manually added approval. This pull-request has been approved by: *Mr-Sunglasses*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Thanks @Mr-Sunglasses /approve /lgtm

Hey @rhatdan , Thanks a lot for approving the PR, but I noticed something strange, since the changes were merged, they are not reflecting on the docs website of [podman-py](https://podman-py.readthedocs.io/en/latest/)
